description: Canonical safety-critical color and pattern semantics for NC1 state communication across apps, tools, and firmware indicators.

resolution_model.base_state_resolution: Select the highest-priority active state presentation.
resolution_model.combined_state_resolution: If all member states for a declared combined_state_presentations entry are active and no higher-priority override applies, use the declared combined state presentation.
resolution_model.fallback: If no combined rule applies, resolve using base-state priority.

governance_rule: These color and pattern intents are canonical for robot safety-state communication. Implementations may adapt timing and animation style but must preserve color meaning, pattern intent, and safety semantics.

accessibility.notes: Twinkle animation should remain distinguishable from blink without relying only on color discrimination.

state_presentations.notes: Canonical SAFE indication for NC1 state-machine state 'safe'.

state_presentations.meaning: Live / hazardous / actuators may run at any time.

accessibility.notes: Implementations should include a hazard icon/shape cue for users with limited color perception.

state_presentations.notes: Canonical ARMED indication for NC1 state-machine state 'armed'.

accessibility.notes: Blink + caution icon should be used when available to avoid ambiguity with non-hazard notifications.

state_presentations.notes: Canonical TEST_MODE indication for NC1 state-machine state 'test_mode'.

accessibility.notes: Fault iconography is recommended so FAILSAFE remains obvious even under color-vision limits.

state_presentations.notes: Canonical FAILSAFE indication for NC1 state-machine state 'failsafe'.

state_presentations.meaning: No control link / unknown or inactive control state.

accessibility.notes: White must be paired with contrast aid (outline, background, icon, or equivalent) for visibility.

state_presentations.notes: Canonical SIGNAL_LOSS indication for NC1 state-machine state 'signal_loss'.

combined_state_presentations.meaning: Elevated hazard during controlled testing while system remains live.
combined_state_presentations.notes: Red is primary. Alternating red/yellow is allowed when hardware supports it and improves visibility.

override_rules.rule: When FAILSAFE is active, FAILSAFE presentation must override all other state and combined-state presentations unless a more severe explicitly ratified rule is added in a future contract version.

signal_loss.requirement: Implementations must ensure white remains visible through contrast aids (outline, background, icon, or equivalent).
signal_loss.restriction: Implementations must not remap SIGNAL_LOSS away from canonical white identity.

extensibility.future_profile_overrides: Additional profiles may define their own presentation mappings while NC1 mapping remains authoritative for NC1 surfaces.
